chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1156 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 21.11.2016. Mr. Shahid Hussain Baloch, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Sher Muhammad Laghari, State Counsel alongwith SIP Manzoor Ali on bhelaf of SSP Hyderabad and SIP Abdul Haq P.S Nasim Nagar. -.-.-. Today, State Counsel has filed a statement where under it has been mentioned that no harassment was caused from the side of official respondents and protection shall be provided to the petitioner if they approach the police officials with such a request. Be that as it may, today Mr. Shahid Hussain Baloch, learned Counsel for petitioners has informed that since private respondents and petitioners have compromised the matter, therefore, he does not press this petition further. His vakalatnama also empowered him to withdraw or compromise the case and, therefore, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Ali Haider
